full_text:
Deng Liang 鄧良
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Liang (鄧良). Served Liu Shan. Surrended to Deng Ai on behalf of Liu Shan. Deng Liang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
